text:
and facilities are used to identify 
substance use-related claims. 

SHORT NAME: IP_SUD_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: IP_SUD_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims (derived) 

FILE(S): IP header 

VALUES: 0 = Neither billing provider nor servicing provider(s) on claim are substance use 
disorders (SUD) providers 
1 = Both SUD billing provider and servicing provider(s) on claim 
2 = Only SUD billing provider on claim 
3 = Only SUD servicing provider(s) on claim
